name: Oatmeal Raisin Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first five ingredients in a bowl.
2. Cut in the butter until well combined.
3. Add the raisins and buttermilk, stirring until blended.
4. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface and knead 10 times.
5. Roll out and cut into biscuits, placing them about 1 inch apart on a baking sheet.
6. Bake at 425°F for 12-15 minutes.
